title: rubus tenuis
intro: Rubus tenuis, also known as the thimbleberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus tenuis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Rubus tenuis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
